'''dalogo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:sabbatic|sabbatic]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-l-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:sabbatic|sabbatic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| dalogo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dælegeth|dælegeth]] || [[word:dælegej|dælegej]] || [[word:dælegesh|dælegesh]] || [[word:dælege|dælege]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dalologoth|dalologoth]] || [[word:dalologoj|dalologoj]] || [[word:dalologosh|dalologosh]] || [[word:dalologo|dalologo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dalogoth|dalogoth]] || [[word:dalogoj|dalogoj]] || [[word:dalogosh|dalogosh]] || [[word:dalogo|dalogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dalofgoth|dalofgoth]] || [[word:dalofgoj|dalofgoj]] || [[word:dalofgosh|dalofgosh]] || [[word:dalofgof|dalofgof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dalogotho|dalogotho]] || [[word:dalogojo|dalogojo]] || [[word:dalogosho|dalogosho]] || [[word:dalogoko|dalogoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dalogoth|dalogoth]] || [[word:dalogoj|dalogoj]] || [[word:dalogosh|dalogosh]] || [[word:dalogo|dalogo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dalogothol|dalogothol]] || [[word:dalogojol|dalogojol]] || [[word:dalogoshol|dalogoshol]] || [[word:dalogokol|dalogokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dalogothotho|dalogothotho]] || [[word:dalogojojo|dalogojojo]] || [[word:dalogoshosho|dalogoshosho]] || [[word:dalogoko|dalogoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dalogothon|dalogothon]] || [[word:dalogojon|dalogojon]] || [[word:dalogoshon|dalogoshon]] || [[word:dalogokon|dalogokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dalogothoro|dalogothoro]] || [[word:dalogojoro|dalogojoro]] || [[word:dalogoshoro|dalogoshoro]] || [[word:dalogokoro|dalogokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
